## Why

Describe the problem, constraint, or maintenance need that motivates this change.

## What Changed

Describe the net change. Keep the description limited to this pull request.

## Compatibility Impact

State whether framework policy, skill contracts, templates, file layout, validation, or project-local records changed.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run validate`

## Human Review

List unresolved conflicts, unknowns, or decisions requiring human review. Use `N/A` if none.
